title: Hello World
summary: A minimal example scenario demonstrating the core scenario structure.

player_role.label: Guest
player_role.brief: You are visiting the example office for a brief meeting.

opening.npc_says: Welcome! How can I help you today?

player_visible: Introduce yourself and state the purpose of your visit.
hidden: The greeter is assessing whether visitors can communicate their purpose clearly in one or two sentences.

warm.label: Warm-up
warm.description: The greeter is patient and volunteers hints if you seem unsure.

standard.label: Standard
standard.description: Realistic pacing — the greeter expects a clear purpose statement.

hard.label: Hard
hard.description: The greeter is brisk; unclear communication lowers clarity quickly.

adversarial.label: Adversarial
adversarial.description: Near-zero tolerance — state is extremely reactive and time is short.

events.npc_instruction: The visitor communicated very clearly. Acknowledge it warmly.
